case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SF/TAX COLLECTOR VS. LUIS ROBERTO MORALES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ARTURO MARTINEZ-SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2012 - JUDGMENT.
